frontmatter.name: Jagannath Sahu
frontmatter.bio: I’m an Infrastructure Engineer focused on Golang and infrastructure tooling, web backends, with a growing interest in building durable software that stands up well over time. I enjoy digging into lower-level system details to understand how software behaves. I’m motivated by solving problems where design, reliability, and operational simplicity all matter.
